title: Git Integrations
subtitle: Connect to GitHub and GitLab to access private repositories

cloud.title: Cloud Platforms
cloud.description: Connect to GitHub and GitLab using OAuth2 authentication. This allows CAPA to access your private repositories.

selfManaged.title: Self-Managed Instances
selfManaged.description: Connect to GitHub Enterprise or GitLab Self-Managed using Personal Access Tokens (PAT).

githubEnterprise.name: GitHub Enterprise
githubEnterprise.hostAndTokenRequired: Please enter both host and token

gitlabSelfManaged.name: GitLab Self-Managed
gitlabSelfManaged.hostAndTokenRequired: Please enter both host and token
